title: Cactus tuberculosus
taxonomy: Cactus tuberculosus is not a widely recognized or established species within the scientific community. However, the cacti family, Cactaceae, is classified within the clade Asterids, which is a subgroup of the larger clade Eudicots in the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, the order Cactales is a subset of the asterid clade, and Cactaceae is the family within this order. The classification can be summarized as follows: kingdom - Plantae; clade - Eudicots; clade - Asterids; order - Cactales; family - Cactaceae. The classification of Cactus tuberculosus is not well-established, but it would likely fit within this broader framework.
uses: Cactus tuberculosus, also known as the Pincushion Cactus, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
